title: LA single-family dwelling, R-3, standard-run stair geometry outside the CRC limits (hard fail)
notes: Hard-fail twin for the CRC R-3 stair pack, adding a second magnitude beyond the existing n=1 cases. Stair type: standard closes the spiral/winder (and stair-side-handrail-guard) exceptions, so the four CRC rules assert hard violations: tread 8 in (< 10, CRC R318.5), riser 8.25 in (> 7-3/4, CRC R318.5), guard 36 in (< 42, CRC R312.1.2), handrail 40 in (> 38, CRC R311.7.8.1 — high side of the range). plan_type residential excludes the IBC EGR twins so they do not double-fire. Stair width 36 in is a clean true negative.

plan_data.project_address: 78 Canyon View Dr, Los Angeles, CA

plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS A-0.1
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 2
Building height: 24 ft
Fully sprinklered: yes
Stair type: standard
NFPA 13D residential sprinklers. Smoke alarms and carbon monoxide alarms shown (R310/R311).
Stairway width: 36 in. Tread depth: 8 in. Max riser: 8.25 in. Guard height: 36 in. Handrail height: 40 in.
Egress window at each sleeping room.

ground_truth.rationale: Tread 8 in below the 10 in CRC R318.5 minimum; standard stair type closes the spiral/winder exception — hard fail.
Riser 8.25 in over the 7-3/4 in CRC R318.5 maximum; standard stair type closes the exception — hard fail.
Guard 36 in below the 42 in CRC R312.1.2 minimum; standard stair type closes the stair-side-handrail-guard exception — hard fail.
Handrail 40 in above the 34-38 in CRC R311.7.8.1 range (high side); standard stair type closes the exception — hard fail.
36 in meets the 36 in CRC R318.7.1 minimum
